title: HubSpot vs SendGrid (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs SendGrid: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and SendGrid comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while SendGrid targets developers and high-volume senders.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers and high-volume senders

faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while SendGrid is stronger for developers and high-volume senders.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or SendGrid?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from SendGrid to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
